zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Henry Gifford於1502年出生在英國哈普爾易欽時，他的父親William Gifford of itchell20歲，母親Eleanor Paulet24歲。他於1520年與Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge在英國波克夏紐波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年10月4日享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Henry Gifford于1502年出生在英国哈普爾易欽时，他的父亲William Gifford of itchell20岁，母亲Eleanor Paulet24岁。他于1520年与Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge在英国波克夏紐波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年10月4日享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Henry Gifford was born in 1502, in Itchen, Hampshire, England, his father, William Gifford of itchell, was 20 and his mother, Eleanor Paulet, was 24. He married Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge in 1520, in Newbury, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 4 October 1572, at the age of 70, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Henry Gifford est né en 1502, à Itchen, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Gifford of itchell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Paulet, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge en 1520, à Newbury, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1572, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Gifford, East Lothian, Scotland: Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Henry Gifford 1502 in Itchen, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gifford of itchell 20 und seine Mutter Eleanor Paulet 24. Er hat 1520 in Newbury, Berkshire, England Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1572 im Alter von 70 Jahren und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Henry Gifford è nato il nel 1502 nel Itchen, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, William Gifford of itchell, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Paulet, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge nel 1520, nel Newbury, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1572, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Henry Giffordが1502年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイトチェンで生まれた時，父William Gifford of itchellは20歳，母Eleanor Pauletは24歳であった。1520年にイギリスバークシュアイアニューブリーでLady Joan Brydges de Bruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年10月4日に70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Gifford, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Henry Gifford(이)가 1502년 영국 함프실르 잇친에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gifford of itchell(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Paulet(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1520년 영국 버크실르 뉴버이에서 Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 10월 4일 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Henry Gifford nasceu em 1502, em Itchen, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gifford of itchell, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Paulet, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge em 1520, em Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1572, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Gifford, East Lothian, Scotland: гиффорд, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Henry Gifford родился в 1502 г. в местности ичэн, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gifford of itchell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Paulet, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge в 1520 г. в местности нюбури, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 4 октября 1572 г. в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Henry Gifford nació en 1502, en Itchen, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gifford of itchell, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Eleanor Paulet, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge en 1520, en Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1572, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
